ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was entered */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was exited */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the financial instrument traded */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trade (e.g., LONG, SHORT) */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was entered */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was exited */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the financial instrument traded */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trading strategy used */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trader who executed the trade */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the broker through which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission or fee paid for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., OPEN, CLOSED, CANCELLED) */,
  "trade_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was last updated */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was actually executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Name of the trader */,
  "trader_email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trader record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trader record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "broker_email" TEXT /* Email address of the broker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the broker record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the broker record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)
